title: Merge volume flags implementation
body:
Merge the implementations of `--mount`, `--volume`, `--volumes-from`, `--tmpfs`, the mount portion of `--init`, and image volumes together into one unified API. Conflicting volumes and superceding volume priorities should be handled correctly here.

As part of this, move all volume-handling code into a single file in `pkg/spec`, storage.go.

Also, add a fresh API entrypoint for generating everything necessary to create a Libpod container out of a CreateConfig, and start making many things in `pkg/spec` private. A single unified entrypoint lets us do extensive refactoring of the package and still not break any users, because the API remains the same.

There are still a lot of WIPs left in the code, but I will hopefully hit them all tomorrow.
